business.name: Handy Hands Appliance Services
business.tagline: When your appliances quit, we don't

hero.headline: When your appliances quit, *we don't*
hero.subheadline: Real repair techs with real tools — not a parts-swapping service

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every appliance, every brand
services_section.subheading: From washers that won't spin to ovens that won't heat

services.title: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.description: Won't start, won't drain, won't spin, making noise — we diagnose and fix it right.

services.title: Refrigerator Repair
services.description: Not cooling, ice maker broken, strange noises — keep your food cold and fresh.

services.title: Dishwasher Repair
services.description: Won't clean, won't drain, door won't latch — get back to spotless dishes.

services.title: Oven & Range Repair
services.description: Won't heat, burners not working, door problems — cooking made simple again.

about.heading: Newport News appliance repair that shows up
about.body: We're the Newport News team that answers the phone and fixes what's broken. One call, honest pricing, real solutions.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREA
service_areas.heading: We cover the Peninsula
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across Newport News and surrounding areas

cta.heading: Appliance acting up? We'll check it out
cta.body: Free estimates, upfront pricing, and we show up when we say we will. Call now or request a quote online.
